evidence: We have incorporated, and are continuing to develop and deploy, AI into our products and the operations of our business.
Our EDA software stack spanning design, verification, and manufacturing is augmented with AI and machine learning through our Synopsys.ai suite of complementary solutions.
in response to recent market trends and underperformance of our Design IP segment, we are in the process of reallocating resources in our IP business to certain higher growth opportunities.
Synopsys.ai offers industry leading AI-driven workflow optimization and data analytics solutions along with Synopsys.ai Copilot generative AI assistive and creatives capabilities.
DSO.ai Design Space Optimization for best quality of results and productivity; VSO.ai Verification Space Optimization for optimal functional verification coverage and faster turnaround time.
Silicon.da Silicon data analytics for root-cause analysis and part-level traceability of failures to improve key production and silicon operational metrics.
If we fail to develop and timely offer products with AI features, if such products fail to meet our customers demands...we may experience brand or reputational harm and lose our competitive position.
The technologies underlying AI and its uses are expected to be subject to new laws and regulations...including in the areas of intellectual property, privacy, data protection and cybersecurity.
techniques used to obtain unauthorized access...change frequently, increasingly leverage technologies such as AI, and generally are not recognized until launched against a target.

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied specifically to AI R&D or AI infrastructure investment were found in the excerpts; named AI programs exist but scale is unquantified, limiting score to 3.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Multiple named AI products and use cases described with operational detail (product names, functions, deployment context), but no quantified business results (e.g., % productivity gains, revenue from AI products) found in excerpts, capping score at 4.
capex_mentions: No AI-attributable dollar figures for capex or R&D spending were present in the excerpts.
